race.comment: BONDI BLOSSOM (7) good filly who held a forward position first-up with a fighting second over 1400m at this track. Won over 1600m last time in and can get cover early from the sticky gate. PECCAVI (11) nice type who was crunched late in betting first-up with a sharp Maiden win over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Gets map favours again and will relish the good tempo. Hard to stop with Zac Lloyd booked. IS IT SPECTACULAR (2) fitter now third-up as he gets out to his right distance range. Went back from the outside gate and never got into the contest with a fading seventh over 1400m in the LR Canberra Guineas. Can race a little closer here and take a hand in the finish. MISTER MARTINI (3) improving gelding who bounced off his good first-up third at Canterbury, with a closing Maiden victory over 1400m at this track. Maps well and can take a hand in the finish.
